subject: A compact Eldrazi drone creature with a bulbous red-brown spiny torso, multiple spike-like projections radiating from its body, and a small skull-like head — surrounded by a burst of scattered spines or projectiles
description: A close-up of an Eldrazi drone centered in the frame against a pale, washed-out white-grey background. Its body is dominated by a large globular torso covered in dense reddish-brown spines or thorn-like protrusions. The creature has a small, skull-like head at the top of the torso, with minimal facial features. Its lower appendages are dark blue-black and claw-like, splaying to either side. Surrounding the creature is a spray or burst of bone-white spike-shaped objects radiating outward — either projectiles being fired or spines extending from its body. The overall effect is radial and explosive in composition. No bilateral symmetry is present.
foreground: Spiny red-brown torso of Eldrazi drone, dark clawed limbs
background: Pale grey-white diffuse light, scattered spike-shaped projectiles
